front: Film/Story: Jack Twist (rodeo cowboy) and Ennis del Mar (rancher) meet as teenagers herding sheep for Joe Aguirre; 'I wish I knew how to quit you'; Alma Beers divorces Ennis after noticing he doesn't use his fishing pole; final scene: Ennis pins a postcard to Jack's blood-stained shirt
back: Brokeback Mountain (Annie Proulx story / Ang Lee film)

front: Film: directed by Ang Lee; screenplay by Larry McMurtry (Oscar) and Diana Ossana; Heath Ledger and Jake Gyllenhaal; won Golden Lion at Venice 2005; lost Best Picture to Crash; final scene: Ennis clutches Jack's jacket and cries; Ledger later won posthumous Oscar for Joker in The Dark Knight
